sections.paragraph:
Original: נכחה

Transliteration: nekôchâh

Phonetic: nek-o-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. straight in front, be in front of, straight, right, straightness
    1. true things (of prophecy)
    2. rectitude (substantive)

Origin: from H5228

TWOT entry: 1365a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective Feminine
